tagline: MSCS @ UMass Amherst | Ex - Developer @ Oracle | AU-MIT'23
about: I am a Master's in Computer Science student at UMass Amherst. I have professional experience as an Associate Software Developer at Oracle, where I contributed to full-stack development, optimized performance, and contributed to AI solutions to enhance customer experience using Python, JavaScript, and modern web technologies. My core competencies include designing and implementing software solutions, developing and integrating ML models with applications, and optimizing database and application performance.

My technical expertise spans Python, Java, C++, Flask, TensorFlow, OpenCV, SQLAlchemy, PHP, HTML, JavaScript, OJET, CSS, MySQL, Oracle, Firebase, Docker, Git, and Android development. I am passionate about building reliable, high-impact systems and continuously learning emerging technologies in ML, AI, and backend engineering.

I am actively looking out for internships, research collaborations, and project opportunities in ML/AI, scalable systems, and full-stack/backend development. Feel free to connect or reach out to discuss potential collaborations.
